model_narrative: We plan a tour over a set of cities, choosing for each ordered pair of cities whether the direct arc from one to the other is used. Every used arc carries a known travel cost. The objective is to choose the arcs so that the total travel cost of all chosen arcs is as small as possible.

sets.name: I
sets.doc: the cities to be visited; an arc runs from an origin city to a destination city, both drawn from this same set

params.name: c
params.doc: the travel cost of going directly from the first city to the second city, in cost units per arc

vars.name: x
vars.doc: takes the value 1 when the direct arc from the first city to the second city is used, and 0 otherwise

description: Each city is left exactly once. For every city, considering all the arcs that start at that city and go to any city, exactly one of those arcs is used.

model_narrative: We plan a tour over a set of cities, choosing for each ordered pair of cities whether the direct arc from one to the other is used. Every used arc carries a known travel cost. The objective is to choose the arcs so that the total travel cost of all chosen arcs is as small as possible.

sets.name: I
sets.doc: the cities to be visited; an arc runs from an origin city to a destination city, both drawn from this same set

params.name: c
params.doc: the travel cost of going directly from the first city to the second city, in cost units per arc

vars.name: x
vars.doc: takes the value 1 when the direct arc from the first city to the second city is used, and 0 otherwise

description: Each city is reached exactly once. For every city, considering all the arcs that come into that city from any city, exactly one of those arcs is used.

model_narrative: We plan a tour over a set of cities, choosing for each ordered pair of cities whether the direct arc from one to the other is used. Every used arc carries a known travel cost. The objective is to choose the arcs so that the total travel cost of all chosen arcs is as small as possible.

sets.name: I
sets.doc: the cities to be visited; an arc runs from an origin city to a destination city, both drawn from this same set

params.name: c
params.doc: the travel cost of going directly from the first city to the second city, in cost units per arc

vars.name: x
vars.doc: takes the value 1 when the direct arc from the first city to the second city is used, and 0 otherwise

description: No city connects directly to itself. For every city, the arc that starts and ends at that same city is never used.

model_narrative: We plan a tour over a set of cities, choosing for each ordered pair of cities whether the direct arc from one to the other is used. Every used arc carries a known travel cost. The objective is to choose the arcs so that the total travel cost of all chosen arcs is as small as possible.

sets.name: I
sets.doc: the cities to be visited; an arc runs from an origin city to a destination city, both drawn from this same set

params.name: c
params.doc: the travel cost of going directly from the first city to the second city, in cost units per arc

vars.name: x
vars.doc: takes the value 1 when the direct arc from the first city to the second city is used, and 0 otherwise

description: To build the complete model, enforce the following relationships in order. First, each city is left exactly once. For every city, considering all the arcs that start at that city and go to any city, exactly one of those arcs is used. Second, each city is reached exactly once. For every city, considering all the arcs that come into that city from any city, exactly one of those arcs is used. Finally, no city connects directly to itself. For every city, the arc that starts and ends at that same city is never used.
